narrative.description: Naughty Dog's time-traveling Crash sequel adds Coco playability, vehicle stages, and relic racing across Egyptian, medieval, and future eras.
narrative.core_loop: Collect crystals across time periods, earn relics in time trials, use super powers from Uka Uka's sibling, and defeat N. Tropy.

mechanics.map_notes: Time-themed stages are forward gauntlets ending in crystal goals.
mechanics.expression: Time-themed stages are forward gauntlets ending in crystal goals.

mechanics.map_notes: Crystals gate hub progression; gems and relics drive completion.
mechanics.expression: Crystals gate hub progression; gems and relics drive completion.

mechanics.map_notes: Crash and Coco swap for stages requiring distinct traversal profiles.
mechanics.expression: Crash and Coco swap for stages requiring distinct traversal profiles.

mechanics.map_notes: Spin and body slam clear enemies and break crates.
mechanics.expression: Spin and body slam clear enemies and break crates.

mechanics.map_notes: Lives from wumpa fruit gate retries.
mechanics.expression: Lives from wumpa fruit gate retries.

mechanics.map_notes: Colored gem paths and death routes extend replay.
mechanics.expression: Colored gem paths and death routes extend replay.

mechanics.map_notes: Medieval traps, jetski courses, and tiger mounts vary hazards.
mechanics.expression: Medieval traps, jetski courses, and tiger mounts vary hazards.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses like Tiny Tiger gate time hub expansion.
mechanics.expression: Bosses like Tiny Tiger gate time hub expansion.

mechanics.map_notes: N. Tropy and Cortex follow learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: N. Tropy and Cortex follow learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Death routes and gem paths demand exact jump timing.
mechanics.expression: Death routes and gem paths demand exact jump timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Super belly flop, double jump, and death tornado alter traversal.
mechanics.expression: Super belly flop, double jump, and death tornado alter traversal.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss charge attacks telegraph with visible wind-up.
mechanics.expression: Boss charge attacks telegraph with visible wind-up.

mechanics.map_notes: Health depletes on hazard and enemy contact.
mechanics.expression: Health depletes on hazard and enemy contact.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Crash Bandicoot: Warped through its core platformer loop.
